verdict.paragraph: This 2010 Audi A4 scores 78/100 (Good Buy), with high confidence in this assessment (92/100). 1 red flag(s) were found - review them before deciding.

This 2012 Audi A4 scores 67/100 (Fair Deal), with high confidence in this assessment (92/100). It has severe known issue(s) past their typical onset mileage (Timing chain tensioner failure), which drives this to an Avoid regardless of price.
